prompt: Buatkan copy pricing page untuk 'Nikahku' — aplikasi undangan digital nikah. Ada 4 paket: Gratis (1 template basic, RSVP 50 tamu), Silver Rp149.000 (5 template premium, RSVP 200 tamu, galeri foto, musik), Gold Rp299.000 (semua template, RSVP unlimited, video opening, amplop digital, countdown), Platinum Rp499.000 (semua fitur Gold + custom domain, guest book, live streaming). Semua harga per event (sekali bayar, bukan langganan). Sudah dipercaya 25.000+ pasangan.

assertions.description: Uses Tanpa pattern for hidden cost fears
Emphasizes one-time payment (bukan langganan/subscription) as a key selling point
Mentions digital payment methods for amplop digital
